channel.title: Mcp-Server on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Mcp-Server on Arrans github.io

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers

item.title: google-gemini/gemini-cli
item.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

item.title: TM9657/flow-like
item.description: Flow-Like: Strongly Typed Enterprise Scale Workflows. Built for scalability, speed, seamless AI integration and rich customization.

item.title: oraios/serena
item.description: A powerful MCP toolkit for coding, providing semantic retrieval and editing capabilities - the IDE for your agent

item.title: ridafkih/keeper.sh
item.description: Open-source calendar sync tool & universal calendar MCP server. Aggregate, sync and control calendars on Google, Outlook, Office 365, iCloud, CalDAV or ICS.

item.title: rusq/slackdump
item.description: Save or export your private and public Slack messages, threads, files, and users locally without admin privileges.
